items.summary: Extend the backend Motoko actor to fully support student registration: ensure the Student type includes all fields from the Flask schema (full_name, email, mobile, course, category, income), and expose a registerStudent update call that inserts a new student record and returns the generated student ID.

Extend the backend Motoko actor to support document upload tracking: ensure the DocumentRecord type includes student_id, document_name, file_path (stored as a Text blob/base64 or filename reference), and upload_status fields. Expose an uploadDocument update call that creates a new document record linked to a student and returns a success message.

Update the frontend React Query hooks (useQueries.ts) to wire the registerStudent and uploadDocument backend calls to the new Motoko actor methods, replacing or supplementing any existing stubs so that the Profile page student creation and Documents page file upload both persist data through the ICP backend actor.
